title: Operation of the sigsuspend Function
description: A flowchart showing the sequence of steps a process takes when using sigsuspend to atomically unblock signals and wait for a handler to run.
elements: Kernel: Signal mask replaced, Process suspended
relationships: Sequential flow from 'Process executing main code' to 'Call to sigsuspend(&mask)'
sigsuspend triggers 'Kernel: Signal mask replaced, Process suspended'
After handler, flow goes to 'Return from handler'
Return finally leads to 'Process resumes main code'
